visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a young man with dark hair, wearing an ornate, silver-colored mask that covers the top half of his face. The mask is intricately designed with a large, dark, faceted gem at the center of his forehead. He is dressed in a dark jacket over a lighter shirt. The background is dark and indistinct, suggesting a dimly lit, cluttered space. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio opens with a sharp, whooshing sound, like a quick, aggressive movement, immediately followed by a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score that creates a tense and foreboding atmosphere. The camera cuts to a medium shot of three men standing in a dark, cluttered room. The central figure, a man with platinum-blonde hair, is dressed in a long black coat. He points a wand forward with a determined expression. Flanking him are two other men, also in dark clothing, who are also pointing wands forward in the same direction.
